title: NYS Archives Records Management Grant -- City Hall Basement Digitization
summary: City Clerk Janet presents item 42, application for NYS Archives grant to bring in records management consultant. Staff have spent two years organizing City Hall basement records, completing about a third. Records include engineering, finance, and assessment files in broken boxes with no retention schedule. Consultant will determine what to keep/destroy per retention schedules. Previous grant funded digitization of marriage records. Records being cataloged in a database for retrieval. Council member volunteers to help.

processing_notes: Department of Finance detection is from 'finance assessment' records in basement, not Finance Department involvement. Presenting department is City Clerk's Office. Two years into multi-year basement records project -- about one-third complete. Prior grant digitized marriage records.
Segment 18 of 23 from Common Council Study Session, Wednesday March 18th 2026
Transcript corrections applied: CNS -> CNS Engineers; SU -> Syracuse University
